name: Pumpking the King of Grave Ghosts
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; Set 1 "Call of the Haunted" from your Deck or GY, and if you do, discard 1 card. That Set card can be activated this turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 6 Zombie monster from your Deck, except with 1950 ATK, also you cannot Special Summon from the hand or GY for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters. You can only use each effect of "Pumpking the King of Grave Ghosts" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Set 1 "Call of the Haunted" from your Deck or GY, and if you do, discard 1 card. That Set card can be activated this turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 6 Zombie monster from your Deck, except with 1950 ATK, also you cannot Special Summon from the hand or GY for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters. You can only use each effect of "Pumpking the King of Grave Ghosts" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Set 1 "Call of the Haunted" from your Deck or GY, and if you do, discard 1 card. That Set card can be activated this turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 6 Zombie monster from your Deck, except with 1950 ATK, also you cannot Special Summon from the hand or GY for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters. You can only use each effect of "Pumpking the King of Grave Ghosts" once per turn.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
